postToolUse.command: STATE="/tmp/copilot-tool-count-$(basename "$PWD" 2>/dev/null || echo 'default')"; touch "$STATE"; COUNT=$(head -1 "$STATE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); COUNT=$((COUNT + 1)); printf '%d\n' "$COUNT" > "$STATE"; if [ $((COUNT % 10)) -eq 0 ]; then echo "{\"additionalContext\":\"📋 Session checkpoint: $COUNT tool calls. Remember to log new patterns to .agents/skills/learnings.md. If you created new conventions or patterns, run /update-skills. Docs changed? Run /generate-docs.\"}"; else echo '{}'; fi
